pre_call_audit.notes_from_googling_them: SanityFree has zero organic discoverability. Searching 'commercial cleaning Barcelona' or 'limpieza oficinas Barcelona' does not surface them. The only way to find them is by searching their exact name. They exist because of direct relationships (Warner contract, word of mouth), not because anyone can find them online. Press coverage exists (InfoNegocios article about expanding to Spain) but no SEO benefit from it. The business itself is solid — real clients, real employees, two countries, proprietary tech — but digitally they're invisible.

Contact only via email and WhatsApp — no phone number
Two websites exist (sanityfree.cleaning and sanityfree.com.ar) — confusing
